name: CoinFlip Bitcoin ATM - Ace Store #1001 (Cleveland)
description_short: CoinFlip Bitcoin ATM at Ace Store #1001 in Cleveland allows customers to buy cryptocurrencies with cash at a physical kiosk location on East 9th Street.
description_long:
CoinFlip operates a Bitcoin ATM network across the United States, with this particular location housed within Ace Store #1001 at 1409 East 9th Street in Cleveland, Ohio. The company positions itself as a convenient, fast, and safe way for consumers to purchase cryptocurrencies using cash without requiring traditional banking intermediaries or online exchanges.

The Ace Store #1001 location offers the ability to purchase Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies directly from the physical ATM kiosk using cash. Customers can create a CoinFlip Account to increase transaction limits up to $15,000 per day (limits vary by location) and are encouraged to download the CoinFlip Crypto Wallet prior to transacting. The location operates on a standard retail schedule: Monday through Friday 9:00 AM–6:00 PM, Saturday 10:00 AM–5:30 PM, and closed Sunday. 24/7 customer support is available via phone and email for transaction assistance and account issues.

This location distinguishes itself by being co-located within an Ace hardware store, providing accessibility within an established retail environment rather than a standalone kiosk. The CoinFlip Account feature allows repeat customers to streamline transactions and track transaction history in one location, reducing friction on subsequent visits. The company also provides educational resources through blog posts covering cryptocurrency basics, specific cryptocurrencies like Solana, and step-by-step transaction guidance.

As a Bitcoin ATM operator rather than a traditional financial services provider, this business model serves cash-preferring consumers seeking direct cryptocurrency access but operates at higher transaction costs than online exchanges. The location-specific transaction limits and variable fees by location mean customers should verify current terms before transacting. The business model depends entirely on cryptocurrency market interest and regulatory environment stability.
pros: No account required for first transaction; immediate cash-to-crypto conversion at physical location
CoinFlip Account allows registered users to transact up to $15,000 per day with streamlined experience
24/7 customer support available via phone (1-877-757-2646) and email (support@coinflip.tech)
Co-located within Ace Store #1001 providing accessibility within established retail environment during store hours
Educational resources provided including cryptocurrency guides and transaction walkthroughs on website
CoinFlip Crypto Wallet available for download to secure coins prior to transaction completion
Multiple cryptocurrency options available beyond Bitcoin for purchase with cash
cons: Limited hours compared to many ATMs (closed Sundays, 6:00 PM closing most weekdays) restricting access for shift workers
Transaction fees not disclosed on website; typically Bitcoin ATMs charge 5-10% markup versus market rates
Transaction limits vary by location without clear explanation of what limits apply at this specific Ace Store #1001
Sell functionality not explicitly listed for this location, while other nearby CoinFlip ATMs offer it
Requires separate cryptocurrency wallet download and setup, adding friction for first-time users
best_for: Cash-preferring customers seeking immediate Bitcoin or cryptocurrency purchase without bank account verification
Repeat customers who benefit from CoinFlip Account features and higher daily transaction limits
Cleveland residents who value neighborhood retail accessibility over online exchange platforms
First-time cryptocurrency buyers seeking in-person guidance with 24/7 support availability
diagnosis: This location is best for cash-carrying customers in Cleveland seeking convenient, immediate cryptocurrency access without online account setup, though they should expect Bitcoin ATM-level fees and verify transaction limits before visiting. The service model prioritizes accessibility and speed over cost efficiency compared to traditional exchanges.
services: Bitcoin purchase with cash at physical kiosk
Purchase of multiple cryptocurrencies (specific coins not detailed but plural mentioned)
CoinFlip Account creation for transaction limit increases up to $15,000 per day
CoinFlip Crypto Wallet download and account setup
24/7 customer support via phone and email
Educational resources and cryptocurrency guides via blog
Frequently asked questions covering transaction processes, wallet setup, and fees
Nearby location discovery for other CoinFlip ATM kiosks in the Cleveland area
